description: §19.4.3 `!{}` call-site handler lifting a PAYLOAD error variant into a state enum (errors-as-states, §6/§19.11). loadItem('missing') fails LoadError.NotFound(id); the `.NotFound(mid)` arm binds the payload and writes @phase = Phase.Missing(mid). @phase snapshots as {variant:'Missing', data:{id:'missing'}}; the handled call keeps the whole E-ERROR-* family silent (§19.6.6 handling-requirement satisfied by the `!{}` catch).
rationale: A `!` function's error result routed through an inline `!{}` call-site handler whose arms lift each error variant into a Phase state enum (errors-as-states, §6/§19.11). loadItem('missing') fails LoadError.NotFound(id); the `.NotFound(mid)` arm writes @phase = Phase.Missing(mid), carrying the payload.
